initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this rust build_error fails: OpenSSL system lib not found — set OPENSSL_DIR env vars. Reproduce the failure with `PATH=/home/administrator/.rustup/toolchains/stable-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin:$PATH cargo check`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.
